subject: feat(design): draft fuel pump icon with green glow on abyss background
body:
Exploratory SVG draft for new app icon. Green (#6FE744) fuel pump
outline with soft glow effect on abyss dark teal (#0D3B40) background.
Geometric construction using lines and rounded rects for legibility
at small sizes. PNG preview rendered at 512x512 via Sharp.

Not yet adopted as the app icon — pending user feedback on design.

Tags: design, icon, draft
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 1
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
Epic: daisyui-theme-migration
Semver: patch
